barRaise.topFinding: Third bar-raise running, second consecutive stalled cycle: still zero commits since 2026-05-29 (last commit 3714adb at 2026-05-29T15:37), and all three carried HIGHs are unchanged and live. fog_of_war._vision_for_compute still dispatches on ballista_tower / mortar_tower / repeater_tower and tent / cottage / house / manor (source/systems/fog_of_war.gd:483,487-494), filenames the v0.80.0 rename deleted, so every armed tower and every housing tier falls through to VISION_STRUCTURE_DEFAULT and ships the wrong fog radius. save_load still writes the script basename as the class key (source/autoloads/save_load.gd:347) and restores res://source/buildings/<class>.tscn (:502) with no save_version field anywhere in the file, so every pre-rename save silently drops renamed buildings on load. The S-34 Phase B / multimesh decision is unmade for a sixth cycle (all eight use_multimesh_* flags false). The YaE landing-card body still pitches HBH as an 'industrial nightmare in oil paint' with Mines / lumberyards / farms (X:\YesAndEverything\index.html:1490), contradicting the far-colony canonical. Nothing has changed since the 2026-05-31 review, so the verdict holds at stalled. The window is still short (three days, not abandonment), but the signal is the same and it is now repeating: two warned-about correctness HIGHs are reaching the running game and a second cycle has passed without the repair.
